scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:property && npm run test:integration
scripts.quality: eslint src scripts tests && node scripts/quality-gate.mjs && jscpd src/js --min-lines 3 --reporters console --exit-code 0 && secretlint "src/**/*" "scripts/**/*" "tests/**/*"
scripts.verify: node scripts/build.mjs && node scripts/verify-assets.mjs && node scripts/verify-bundle.mjs && npm run quality && npm test && npm run test:coverage && node scripts/package-release.mjs && node scripts/verify-release.mjs
